## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 14, 2026 - Jun 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alban R_, Jun 14, 2026, 1/5: "S25 with One UI 8.5: Since the Samsung One UI 8 to One UI 8.5 upgrade, the app has kept on crashing after a few minutes while listening to news articles. Fix this as it's really annoying."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 5, 2026 - Jun 9, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Robert G_, Jun 9, 2026, 1/5: "They removed casting from the video, I can no longer send to the TV in my office. What a ridiculous thing to remove, canceled my subscription because I'm not using it now."
            2. _Jason Taucher_, Jun 5, 2026, 1/5: "Can't read any articles without an expensive subscription."
